personal.name: Hrima Mohammed
personal.title: Software Engineer
personal.summary: Full stack engineer specializing in performance-critical code and architecting scalable web applications. My focus is on reliability and efficiency — skills I developed from a unique foundation. While I transitioned from Mechanical and CNC Engineering to IT, my background instilled a deep commitment to precision, robust architecture, and process optimization principles I now apply directly to maximizing code quality and application reliability.
personal.shortBio: I build things from the ground up. A compiled language, a frontend framework, a 3D raytracer, and production systems for real banks. From LLVM backends to Next.js UIs — I love understanding how every layer works.

stats.label: Latency reduction
stats.detail: at GoQuant, C++ multithreaded trading system

interests: Understanding the inner workings of technologies
